title: 007 First Light: James Bond game redefines iconic British spy
description: The video game presents a young Bond before he has earned his "00" spy status.
content:
A new James Bond is about to make his debut - not on the big screen, but in a video game.
007 First Light introduces a younger version of Ian Fleming's iconic spy, played by Irish actor Patrick Gibson.
It presents Bond before he's earned his "00" sta... [3597 chars]

title: Why essentials like eggs, bread and milk cost so much more now
description: Six supermarket brand eggs cost £1 in 2022. How much are they now, why have they gone up, and is anyone profiteering?
content:
Many of us have been buying the same supermarket staples every week for years.
And we've all noticed when we get to the checkout the total is higher now than it used to be - even when we've left luxuries like wine or biscuits on the shelf.
But you mi... [4895 chars]

title: UK heatwave likely to be confirmed as record-breaking temperatures forecast
description: The soaring temperatures could lead to new national May temperature records being set on bank holiday Monday.
content:
A heatwave is expected to officially be declared for parts of the UK on Sunday as a spell of unusual May heat intensifies.
A temperature of 30.5C was recorded at Frittenden in Kent on Saturday - the highest of the year so far. The soaring temperature... [2290 chars]

title: Rosenberg: Luhansk strike sparks Russian accusations and vow to retaliate
description: Eighteen people were killed and 42 others injured in the strike on the town in Russian-occupied eastern Ukraine.
content:
On Russian state TV a news bulletin shows images of a five-storey building reduced to rubble.
Teams of rescuers are sifting through debris.
On a severely damaged façade there's a sign:
"Starobilsk Professional College."

title: Usyk vs Rico: Ukrainian heavyweight champion stops novice in controversial 11th-round stoppage win
description: Oleksandr Usyk retained his world heavyweight titles in Egypt with a highly controversial stoppage win against boxing novice Rico Verhoeven.
content:
Oleksandr Usyk struck lucky to retain his world heavyweight titles in Egypt with a highly controversial 11th-round stoppage win against boxing novice Rico Verhoeven.
Verhoeven, in just his second professional boxing fight, was the clear aggressor for... [5030 chars]
